title: voandzeia subterranea var. spontanea
intro: Voandzeia subterranea var. spontanea, also known as the African yam bean, is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to lower blood sugar levels and provide essential nutrients such as protein and fiber. The herbal preparations of Voandzeia subterranea var. spontanea can be made into a decoction or infusion, often used as a treatment for various ailments in traditional African medicine.
